meta.title: Poet Not Dead — International Creative Movement
meta.description: Poet Not Dead is an international creative movement and open mic for all forms of art. We heal people through art. Poetry, music, dance, visual art in Bali and worldwide.
meta.keywords: poet not dead, open mic, poetry, music, art, Bali, creative movement, open mic bali

hero.h1: Poet Not Dead — Poetry and Music Open Mic in Bali

about.title: About
about.p1: Poet Not Dead is an international creative movement and open mic for all forms of art. We create a space where everyone can take the stage and share their creativity — be it music, poetry, dance, visual art, or theater.
about.p2: We believe that creativity is not a privilege of the few, but an essential part of every human being. Our events bring together professional artists and emerging creators in one space, where there are no boundaries between stage and audience.
about.p3: Poet Not Dead is a community of people who believe in the power of art to change lives. We are open to everyone who wants to create, listen, and be inspired.

mission.title: Mission
mission.subtitle: We heal people through art
mission.freedomDesc: Every voice matters. We create a safe space where there is no right or wrong art.
mission.inspirationDesc: We awaken the creator in everyone. Each person carries a spark — we help it ignite.
mission.healingDesc: Art heals. We believe in its therapeutic power and create a space for transformation.
mission.communityDesc: We unite creators from around the world. Together we are stronger, together we build the future.

manifest.title: Manifest
manifest.body3: We remember the genius of our ancestors
manifest.body4: We carry their words through the ages
manifest.body7: In our words is the future

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.ilona: This is a magnificent place for expression, for sharing your art. For every artist, whether you are just starting your journey or continuing it — projects like this set the tone to never give up! To see burning eyes and hearts and be inspired.
reviews.sofia: A wonderful place for bold expression and creative experiments. I am infinitely grateful to the universe that this project exists as a cultural phenomenon and unites people with burning eyes and sharp tongues.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1: What is Poet Not Dead Open Mic?
faq.a1: A unique event combining professional artist performances with an open mic where anyone can take the stage.
faq.q2: How do I register to perform?
faq.a2: Take a seat on the poufs near the stage and wait for your turn. For the main program — contact us on Telegram.
faq.q3: Do I need to bring my own equipment?
faq.a3: We provide basic sound equipment and a microphone. Bring any special instruments with you.
faq.a4: Open mic — up to 5-10 minutes. Main program artist — about 20-30 minutes.
faq.a5: No, entrance and participation are free.
faq.q6: Can I come just as a viewer?
faq.a6: Yes, performing is not mandatory. The audience plays an important role in supporting artists.
faq.a7: Suitable for all ages, but some performances may contain adult material.
